topic_title: Israel and Lebanon exchange fire as ceasefire efforts remain strained
topic_summary: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon have resulted in multiple casualties, including paramedics and soldiers, while Hezbollah continues drone operations in northern Israel. Despite the April 17 ceasefire, Israel has ordered new evacuations in several Lebanese border towns as bombardment intensifies.

findings.title: Two paramedics and soldier among 15 killed in Israeli strikes in Lebanon
findings.summary:
Two paramedics and soldier among 15 killed in Israeli strikes in Lebanon

    
    

        
    
                Fifteen people, including two paramedics and a Lebanese soldier, were killed and 13 others wounded on Tuesday in 59 Israeli attacks across Lebanon, according to Anadolu Agency.

The reported attacks included air strikes and artillery shelling despite a ceasefire declared on 17 April.

Israeli aircraft carried out 23 raids in the Tyre district, targeting areas including Tyre, Al-M...

findings.title: Guerre au Moyen-Orient: au nord d'Israël, la menace permanente des drones du Hezbollah
findings.summary: L'armée israélienne a déclaré mardi 12 mai 2026 que ses troupes avaient mené une opération de plusieurs jours dans la région du fleuve Litani, dans le sud du Liban, où des échanges de tirs avec le Hezbollah se poursuivent malgré un cessez-le-feu. 13 morts ont été annoncés mardi soir dans des frappes israeliennes selon les autorités libanaises. findings.title: Israel strikes Lebanon as 380 reported killed since April 17 ceasefire
findings.summary:
Israel hammered south Lebanon with strikes on Tuesday ahead of talks between the two countries in Washington, as Beirut reported 380 people killed in Israeli attacks since an April 17 ceasefire took effect.
Hezbollah chief Naim Qassem vowed to turn the battlefield into “hell” for Israeli forces, and insisted his Iran-backed group’s weapons would not be up for discussion at the talks on Thursday and Friday, after the US had called for its disarmament.
Israel has intensified its attacks on sout...

findings.title: Israel orders evacuations in six south Lebanon towns
Israeli drone strike hits town in southern Lebanon
findings.summary:
Israeli drone strike hits town in southern Lebanon

    
    

        
    
                The Israeli military said several rockets were fired by Hezbollah towards Israeli forces operating in southern Lebanon during the past few hours, adding that the projectiles landed near troops without causing injuries.

The army also said it intercepted a “hostile aerial target” aimed at Israeli forces in the area.

Meanwhile, the Israeli Home Front Command reported that warning sirens sounded in Aviv...

findings.title: Sauver le cessez-le-feu entre Israël et le Liban en composant avec ses limites
findings.summary: La trêve entre Israël et le Hezbollah, prolongée le 23 avril, ne tient qu’à un fil. Le mécanisme de surveillance mis en place pour le précédent cessez-le-feu pourrait aider à préserver l’actuel.

findings.title: Gaza's displaced persons' camps are overrun by rats
findings.summary: A United Nations agency report published on May 7 highlights the proliferation of rodents and insects in the Palestinian enclave, leading to a surge in cases of bites and skin diseases. Yet, Israel continues to block the entry of equipment needed to clear the mounds of rubble and garbage where these pests thrive.

findings.title: To Salvage the Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire, Work within Its Limits
findings.summary: The truce between Israel and Hizbollah, extended on 23 April, is hanging by a thread. The monitoring mechanism established for the previous ceasefire could help preserve the current one.
findings.text: To Salvage the Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire, Work within Its Limits | The truce between Israel and Hizbollah, extended on 23 April, is hanging by a thread. The monitoring mechanism established for the previous ceasefire could help preserve the current one.

findings.title: EN DIRECT - Moyen-Orient: nouvelle frappe israélienne sur l'autoroute au sud de Beyrouth
findings.summary: Mardi 12 mai, le ministre chinois des Affaires étrangères s'est entretenu par téléphone avec son homologue pakistanais pour « intensifier » ses efforts de médiation entre l'Iran et les États-Unis, et exprimer l'intention de son pays de continuer à le soutenir, a rapporté Chine Nouvelle. Ce mercredi, une nouvelle frappe israélienne a visé une voiture au niveau de Jiyeh, sur l'autoroute très fréquentée reliant Beyrouth au sud du Liban, a rapporté l'Agence nationale d'information.
findings.text: EN DIRECT - Moyen-Orient: nouvelle frappe israélienne sur l'autoroute au sud de Beyrouth | Mardi 12 mai, le ministre chinois des Affaires étrangères s'est entretenu par téléphone avec son homologue pakistanais pour « intensifier » ses efforts de médiation entre l'Iran et les États-Unis, et exprimer l'intention de son pays de continuer à le soutenir, a rapporté Chine Nouvelle. Ce mercredi, une nouvelle frappe israélienne a visé une voiture au niveau de Jiyeh, sur l'autoroute très fréquentée reliant Beyrouth au sud du Liban, a rapporté l'Agence nationale d'information.

findings.title: Sport helping displaced Lebanese living in stadium to cope
findings.summary: More than a million people have been forced to flee their homes in southern Lebanon due to fighting between Israeli forces and Hezbollah. As many shelter in Beirut stadiums, sport is sometimes a welcome distraction.

findings.title: Video: Israel passes law to execute Palestinians linked to 7 October attacks
findings.summary:
Video: Israel passes law to execute Palestinians linked to 7 October attacks

    
    

        
    
                The Israeli parliament approved a bill on Tuesday to establish public trials and impose the death penalty on Palestinian detainees accused of taking part in the 7 October attacks.

The legislation was passed in the Knesset with 93 votes in favour and no opposition, drawing support from across the political spectrum.


The Israeli parliament approved a bill on Tuesday to estab...

findings.title: War in Iran: Despite Iranian attacks, Doha steps up mediation efforts
findings.summary: Qatar is intensifying regional mediation efforts despite the Iran war bringing airstrikes and cutting off Doha's access to global oil markets. But can Qatar leverage its ties to the US and Iran for its own benefit?

findings.title: Eurovision başladı ama İsrail var diye yayınlamıyorlar
findings.summary: AVUSTURYA’nın başkenti Viyana’da dün başlayan Eurovision Şarkı Yarışması’na İsrail’e yönelik protestolar damga vurdu. 70 yıllık tarihindeki en büyük boykotla karşı karşıya kalan Eurovision, İsrail’in işlediği suçlar ve hak ihlalleri nedeniyle daha önce çekilme kararı alan İspanya, İrlanda ve Slovenya’da yayınlanmadı.

findings.title: Sudan: Between Khartoum and Nyala - Humanitarian Aid Stuck Amid Legitimacy Conflict
findings.summary: [Ayin Network] UN estimates indicate that more than 33 million Sudanese, including millions of people in Darfur, Kordofan and Blue Nile, are in urgent need of humanitarian assistance. However, this assistance is now at risk after the humanitarian file has turned into a political battleground between the warring parties: the Rapid Support Forces (RSF) and the Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF), which vie for the legitimacy of granting work permits to organisations.
findings.text: Sudan: Between Khartoum and Nyala - Humanitarian Aid Stuck Amid Legitimacy Conflict | [Ayin Network] UN estimates indicate that more than 33 million Sudanese, including millions of people in Darfur, Kordofan and Blue Nile, are in urgent need of humanitarian assistance. However, this assistance is now at risk after the humanitarian file has turned into a political battleground between the warring parties: the Rapid Support Forces (RSF) and the Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF), which vie for the legitimacy of granting work permits to organisations.

findings.title: Children shot, stabbed and pepper-sprayed in occupied West Bank
findings.summary: Israeli military operations and surging settler attacks in the occupied West Bank are killing and maiming a growing number of Palestinian children, while in Gaza tens of thousands with life-changing injuries lack access to treatment and rehabilitation, UN agencies warned on Tuesday.

findings.title: Sudan: UN Warns Sudan War Entering 'Deadlier Phase' As Drone Strikes Kill Hundreds, Attacks Spread Across Multiple Regions
findings.summary: [Dabanga] Khartoum / Omdurman / El Obeid / El Goz Locality / -- Sudan's worsening humanitarian crisis deepened sharply on Tuesday as the United Nations warned that drone warfare, artillery shelling, fires in displacement camps, and intercommunal violence are driving the country towards an even bloodier phase of conflict.

Iran says conflict will define ‘good and evil’ for future generations

    
    

        
    
                Iran’s Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei issued a lengthy statement on X describing the conflict involving the United States, Israel and Iran as a defining struggle that would determine “the very meaning of ‘good’ and ‘evil’ in our time and for future generations”.

Baghaei accused Israel and the US of fabricating justifications for violence, while portraying Iran a...

findings.title: The shattered Iranian lives of Manije, Mohammad-Reza and Soroush, all killed by bombings
findings.summary: Before the Israeli-US bombings began, they were living as retirees and artists in different parts of Tehran. Until they met their deaths in their own homes. Tormented by distress, their loved ones abroad and in Iran recount their last conversations before fate took a tragic turn.

findings.title: Iran warns US to accept peace plan or risk collapse of Middle East truce
findings.summary: Iran’s chief negotiator said on Tuesday that Washington must accept Tehran’s latest peace plan or risk the collapse of the Middle East truce, after President Donald Trump warned the ceasefire was near failure. The war, triggered by US-Israeli strikes on Iran more than two months ago, has destabilised the region and rattled global markets.
findings.text: Iran warns US to accept peace plan or risk collapse of Middle East truce | Iran’s chief negotiator said on Tuesday that Washington must accept Tehran’s latest peace plan or risk the collapse of the Middle East truce, after President Donald Trump warned the ceasefire was near failure. The war, triggered by US-Israeli strikes on Iran more than two months ago, has destabilised the region and rattled global markets.

findings.title: Emmanuel Macron’s speaks about France's policies in Sahel countries
findings.summary: "I think we should have had that challenging dialogue sooner. And perhaps in such cases, we should have rethought our military presence sooner." In his interview with FRANCE 24, RFI and TV5Monde, French President Emmanuel Macron reflected on the state of relations between France and the Sahel countries. Here's a part of his interview.

findings.title: ‘İsrail tecavüzüne ABD de ortak’... Hapishane kâbusunu Amerikan basını da yazdı
findings.summary: Amerikan NYT gazetesi yazarı Kristof, İsrail hapishanelerinde tutulan Filistinlilerin maruz kaldığı tecavüz, cinsel şiddet ve işkenceyi mağdurların tanıklıklarıyla yazdı. Filistinli tutuklular, copla cinsel saldırıdan sistematik aşağılanmaya kadar yaşadıkları ağır istismarları anlattı. Kristof, “İsrail güvenlik sistemini finanse eden ABD de bu suça ortak” diyerek Washington’a “zulmü durdurun” çağrısı yaptı.
findings.text: ‘İsrail tecavüzüne ABD de ortak’... Filistinli tutuklular, copla cinsel saldırıdan sistematik aşağılanmaya kadar yaşadıkları ağır istismarları anlattı. findings.title: Iran: Surge of political prisoners amid US-Israel war
findings.summary: Amid the US-Israel war with Iran, as the world breathlessly watches the Strait of Hormuz, Tehran is quietly increasing pressure on political prisoners. Advocates are sounding the alarm, warning of mass executions.
findings.text: Iran: Surge of political prisoners amid US-Israel war | Amid the US-Israel war with Iran, as the world breathlessly watches the Strait of Hormuz, Tehran is quietly increasing pressure on political prisoners. Advocates are sounding the alarm, warning of mass executions.

findings.title: October 7: New report documents extent of sexual violence committed by Hamas
findings.summary: The most comprehensive report to date on October 7, with 400 witnesses and experts, finds that Hamas has 'deliberately and systematically resorted to sexual and gender-based violence.'
findings.text: October 7: New report documents extent of sexual violence committed by Hamas | The most comprehensive report to date on October 7, with 400 witnesses and experts, finds that Hamas has 'deliberately and systematically resorted to sexual and gender-based violence.'

findings.title: Solarparks sollen in der Wüste Regen erzeugen
findings.summary: Die Vereinigten Arabischen Emirate wollen mehr Regen. An der Universität Hohenheim gibt es jetzt eine ungewöhnliche Idee: große Solarparks, zusammen mit künstlich angelegten Dünen und Pflanzen. Von Franziska Ehrenfeld.
findings.text: Solarparks sollen in der Wüste Regen erzeugen | Die Vereinigten Arabischen Emirate wollen mehr Regen. An der Universität Hohenheim gibt es jetzt eine ungewöhnliche Idee: große Solarparks, zusammen mit künstlich angelegten Dünen und Pflanzen. Von Franziska Ehrenfeld.

findings.title: Jihadist and Separatist Rebels Gain Ground in Mali
findings.summary: This week on Hold Your Fire!, Richard speaks with Crisis Group expert Ibrahim Yahaya Ibrahim about the wave of coordinated attacks by Islamist militants and Tuareg rebels across Mali, the implications for the military authorities in Bamako and where things are headed.
findings.text: Jihadist and Separatist Rebels Gain Ground in Mali | This week on Hold Your Fire!, Richard speaks with Crisis Group expert Ibrahim Yahaya Ibrahim about the wave of coordinated attacks by Islamist militants and Tuareg rebels across Mali, the implications for the military authorities in Bamako and where things are headed.

findings.title: Discord over Israel splits Eurovision
findings.summary: The iconic musical jamboree is in crisis mode after five countries declared they would boycott the competition in protest over the war in Gaza.
findings.text: Discord over Israel splits Eurovision | The iconic musical jamboree is in crisis mode after five countries declared they would boycott the competition in protest over the war in Gaza.

findings.title: Iraq denies reports of unknown military sites in Najaf desert
Türkiye Charts a Distinctive Course amid Middle East Turmoil
findings.summary: Much is at stake for Türkiye, a growing regional power, amid the shaky truce in the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran. It will face new risks and opportunities in the post-war dispensation. For now, it wants to help end the confrontation as soon as possible.
findings.text: Türkiye Charts a Distinctive Course amid Middle East Turmoil | Much is at stake for Türkiye, a growing regional power, amid the shaky truce in the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran. It will face new risks and opportunities in the post-war dispensation. For now, it wants to help end the confrontation as soon as possible.
